side_effects.description: Gained 8lbs unexpectedly despite clean diet and active lifestyle; suspects water retention from Ipamorelin

protocol_notes: 55-year-old female on HRT (Progesterone, Estrogen, Testosterone). Lost 140lbs without GLP medications prior to peptide use. Also taking Ritalin for ADHD. Had Osteopenia diagnosis 6 years ago. Has been on Ipamorelin for 6 months. Eats clean, drinks water, walks >20K steps/day. Gained 8lbs unexpectedly. Commenter noted Ritalin may have contributed to weight gain through increased appetite despite expected appetite suppression.
